note: Hand-entered LA Memorial Day weekend events (May 23-25, 2026). Confirm details on each venue's site before going.

events.title: LA Fleet Week — Memorial Day Weekend
events.description: Free public Fleet Week event at the Port of Los Angeles. Ship tours, aircraft flyovers, live music including military band performances, and the Galley Wars culinary competition.
events.venue: Port of Los Angeles, Battleship USS Iowa area

events.title: LA Fleet Week — Memorial Day Weekend
events.description: Free public Fleet Week event at the Port of Los Angeles. Ship tours, aircraft flyovers, live music, and family-friendly programming.
events.venue: Port of Los Angeles, Battleship USS Iowa area

events.title: LA Fleet Week — Memorial Day
events.description: Final day of Fleet Week at the Port of LA. Ship tours, military demonstrations, live music, family-friendly programming.
events.venue: Port of Los Angeles, Battleship USS Iowa area

events.title: Canoga Park Memorial Day Parade
events.description: Opening ceremony at 10am followed by parade at 11am along Sherman Way from Owensmouth Avenue to Cozycroft Street.

events.title: Los Angeles National Cemetery Memorial Day Ceremony
events.description: VA-hosted Memorial Day commemoration with flag placement, guest speakers, and a moment of silence to honor those who sacrificed everything.
